GitHub Get Started

OpenPRX

prx-memory

Local-first MCP memory for coding agents

A memory runtime that keeps agent context durable, queryable, and governed.

Repository

Key Features

  • stdio and HTTP transport modes
  • Complete memory toolchain: store, recall, update, forget
  • Governance controls and evolution-ready data model
  • Works with Codex, Claude Code, and OpenClaw

Tech Stack

Rust

Quick Start

git clone https://github.com/openprx/prx-memory.git
cd prx-memory
cargo run --features http
